description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GcodeAnalyzer that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific branches and paths. The workflow checks an actor, verifies a Conan recipe version, and then runs GCodeAnalyzer on a CuraEngine. This involves checking out multiple repositories, setting up Python and Conan, installing dependencies, building CuraEngine, running GCodeAnalyzer on generated GCode files, and storing benchmark results.
